case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MONIQUE S. WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERIVCE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE MONIQUE S WILLIAMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MONIQUE S. $1,628.25 PRINCIPAL, $357.30 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,221.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: VENUE PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) AND CCP 396 (A) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MONIQUE S.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION RE: 1. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS 3. INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MONIQUE S.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED AUG-24-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MONIQUE S.
DECLARATION RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B) (2); WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MONIQUE S. DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2012
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MONIQUE S.
